name: Prayers for Peace
description: Prayers to cultivate inner peace and trust in God's sovereignty.

prayers.title: Surrender anxiety to God
prayers.description: Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you. (1 Peter 5:7)

prayers.title: Pray for a calm mind
prayers.description: Ask God to quiet the noise and fill you with His peace that surpasses understanding.

prayers.title: Trust in God's timing
prayers.description: Release your timelines and trust that God's timing is perfect.

prayers.title: Pray for restful sleep
prayers.description: Ask God to guard your mind and grant you peaceful rest tonight.

prayers.title: Release control
prayers.description: Surrender the things you cannot change and trust God with the outcome.

prayers.title: Pray for contentment
prayers.description: Ask God to help you find joy and contentment in your current season.
